expectations.text: Markdown table has 6 rows with Discogs release links
Every Discogs link resolves to a real release via the API
Artist cell matches the release-page credit exactly (join phrases included)
Track cell matches a title on the release's tracklist verbatim
Every YouTube pick comes from the release page's videos, or the deviation/skip is noted in the row
playlist_items.json exists and every video id is live and public
Rows are sorted ascending by release date
All six tracks credibly involve Black Detroit artists (grader judgment)
expectations.evidence: picks are UR/X-101/Drexciya/G2G/Mills — all verifiably Black Detroit
